_comment: Handbook visible-band (~589 nm) refractive indices used ONLY as training/validation targets for the optics surrogate. These are measured anchors; they NEVER feed the engine's photon transport (which always uses the physics-derived n from MolecularOptics). Sources: CRC Handbook / Schott / manufacturer data; approximate. Keyed by the optics_training_panel.js config material name.
